summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trading Terminal feature. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI fully functional with real-time data updates, symbol switching, and proper decision logic. Password gate bypassed in dev mode as expected.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection to '/api/ws' failing with 403 error
integration_issues.impact: Non-blocking - app uses HTTP polling instead
integration_issues.details: WebSocket errors in console but functionality works via HTTP polling every 3 seconds

passed_tests: Trading Terminal UI loads without password gate (dev mode bypass)
Dark sidebar and light content area layout
All trading blocks present (Decision, Why, Execution, Microstructure, Positions)
Decision block shows action and confidence percentage
Why block displays reasons with strength badges
Execution block shows mode, size, entry/SL/TP, R:R ratio
Microstructure block displays imbalance, spread, liquidity, state
Positions block shows 2 mock positions with PnL
Execute button correctly disabled for WAIT/SKIP decisions
Execute button correctly enabled for GO decisions
